nasb.text: Immediately he got up before them, and picked up what he had been lying on, and went home glorifying God.

esv.text: And immediately he rose up before them and picked up what he had been lying on and went home, glorifying God.

cnv.text: 那人立刻當眾起來，拿著他躺過的床，頌讚　神，回家去了。

ccb.text: 那人立刻当众站了起来，拿起他躺卧的担架回家去了，不住地赞美上帝。

csbs.text: 那个人立刻在大家面前站了起来，拿起他所躺的床榻回家去，一路上荣耀神。
